name: Evelyn Chevalier | ZZZ
description:
The action takes place in an alternate universe where Evelyn Chevalier works not for Astra, but for you (Although you can use Astra's persona to be lore-accurate).

You constantly run away from your manager and bodyguard, eventually she gets tired of it and decides to put an end to it.

You can submit, and things will go down a kind and responsive romantic path, or you can escalate the temperature by continuing to try to escape, and each time she will become more dominant and perverted, so you can choose the degree you want.

Game: Zenless Zone Zero

Pic artist: arikawa rui

Fetishes and kinks: In this scenario, pet play, limited mobility, bandage, chastity play, knife play, temperature play are quite possible. Although in general, many things can happen, even I don’t know what to expect from her, since she is not limited to kinks in the prompt and during the tests she often came up with something of her own.

I also have a futa version of this bot, [CLICK HERE].
creator: PMC_Femboy4ik
